---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for SubChat
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you want.

## 🎯 Problem/Use Case
What problem does this solve? What use case does it support?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
How would you like this feature to work?

## 🎨 UI/UX Mockups
If applicable, add mockups or describe the UI.

## 🔧 Technical Implementation
Any thoughts on how this could be implemented?

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3

## 🌟 Priority
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context or examples.
